verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Well, I remember the time I was so low in sin, Dear Jesus You came And showed me Your grace; Now no one can ever take me from Your hand, And now I could never be the same For now I live only for You by Your grace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For Jesus is all I have to live for, Jesus is my truest friend That I could ever lean on, He can be trusted And His word can never fail, He is the comfort of my soul. He is the comfort of my soul.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sometimes I get weak and can’t go on, But Jesus You're there to make me strong, And though I be tempted, You are my Shield; Oh Lord, You have showed me such love, All I have I surrender to You.
